title: satureja laxiflora subsp. zuvandica
intro: Satureja laxiflora subsp. zuvandica, also known as the Zuvo or Iranian savory, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Satureja laxiflora subsp. zuvandica include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Satureja laxiflora subsp. zuvandica can be prepared as a tea, oil, or dried herb for use in herbal remedies.
